message:
test(mermaid): add Gantt rendering assertion to PTY showcase + sankey edge case fixture

Extend pty_mermaid_harness_metrics_jsonl_present to verify that at least
one Gantt diagram renders with error_count=0 and no fallback, ensuring
the Gantt pipeline produces real output and doesn't silently degrade.

Add sankey_edge_case.mmd fixture covering decimal flow values, very small
values (0.001), and unquoted single-word node labels.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+%% fixture_id: sankey_edge_case
+%% purpose: edge cases for sankey-beta parsing and layout
+sankey-beta
+  "Source A","Target X",100.5
+  "Source A","Target Y",50.25
+  "Source B","Target X",75
+  "Source B","Target Z",0.001
+  "Target X","Final",150
+  "Target Y","Final",50.25
+  "Target Z","Final",0.001
+  SingleWord,Destination,42
